matched.name: Crox
matched.description: Crox is a cafe table designed for offices and lounges. The cross-base layout keeps the table steady through daily use.

overview_sections.heading: Refined Simplicity
overview_sections.body: The Crox Café Table adds a fresh, modern touch to any café or collaborative space. Its sleek tabletop paired with a sturdy cross-base design delivers the perfect balance of style and stability for daily use.

Crafted with quality detailing, it enhances comfort and visual appeal during casual meetings, coffee breaks, or shared conversations. A chic blend of modern style and inviting warmth, ideal for lively everyday settings.

This product offers multiple tabletop designs and material finishes, making it highly customizable to suit various interior styles. The variety ensures you can select a top that perfectly matches your aesthetic, whether for a café, office, or home setting.

The base features a simple, yet stylish, criss-cross metal base frame that provides sturdy support for the round wooden tabletop. Its open wire design ensures structural stability while maintaining a visually light and modern aesthetic.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.
